title: Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group!
